requirement_topic.en: Public EV Charging Operation, Connection, Metering, and Tariff Cluster
requirement_topic.zh: 公共充电运营、接入、计量和电价集群
requirement_topic.zht: 公共充電營運、接入、計量和電價集群

summary.en: NEPRA's EV charging-station framework treats public EV charging as an operational and utility-service matter: commercial consumer categorisation, service connection topology, metering for total station and per-user kWh, applicable tariff or margin controls, and price display need to be handled through the operator and utility file.
summary.zh: NEPRA充电站框架将公共充电视为运营和公用事业服务事项：商业用户分类、服务接入拓扑、场站总用电和单个用户kWh计量、适用电价或加价控制以及价格展示，均需通过运营商和公用事业文件处理。
summary.zht: NEPRA充電站框架將公共充電視為營運和公用事業服務事項：商業用戶分類、服務接入拓撲、場站總用電和單個用戶kWh計量、適用電價或加價控制以及價格展示，均需通過營運商和公用事業文件處理。

standards_or_laws: NEPRA Regulatory Framework for Electric Vehicle Charging Stations

summary.en: China charger reports, GB/T 27930 backend records, and GB/T 18487.1-2023 safety evidence may support the technical file, but they do not establish Pakistan commercial consumer status, utility meter acceptance, billing margin, or public price-display compliance.
summary.zh: 中国充电设备报告、GB/T 27930后台记录和GB/T 18487.1-2023安全证据可支持技术文件，但不能确定巴基斯坦商业用户身份、公用事业计量表接受、计费加价或公共价格展示合规。
summary.zht: 中國充電設備報告、GB/T 27930後台記錄和GB/T 18487.1-2023安全證據可支持技術文件，但不能確定巴基斯坦商業用戶身份、公用事業計量表接受、計費加價或公共價格展示合規。

gap.en: Merge the previous connection, separate-service, metering, price-display, and policy rows into one operator dossier: utility application, single or multi-EVSE service assumptions, meter specifications and calibration, billing logic, audit logs, receipts, website/app price fields, and premises signage.
gap.zh: 应将此前的接入、单独服务、计量、价格展示和政策行合并为一个运营商资料包：公用事业申请、单台或多台EVSE服务假设、计量表规格和校准、计费逻辑、审计日志、收据、网站/应用价格字段及场所标识。
gap.zht: 應將此前的接入、單獨服務、計量、價格展示和政策行合併為一個營運商資料包：公用事業申請、單台或多台EVSE服務假設、計量表規格和校準、計費邏輯、審計日誌、收據、網站／應用價格欄位及場所標識。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for public EV charging-station operators to the extent the NEPRA framework, applicable tariff determinations, Consumer Service Manual, and utility conditions apply
mandatory_status.cn: Not covered by China GB/T product standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan public charging compliance is an operator-plus-utility workstream, not just an EVSE product certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦公共充电合规是运营商加公用事业工作流，而不仅是EVSE产品证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦公共充電合規是營運商加公用事業工作流，而不僅是EVSE產品證書。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Code 2023, Distribution Code, and CSM Context
requirement_topic.zh: 2023电网规范、配电规范和消费者服务手册背景
requirement_topic.zht: 2023電網規範、配電規範和消費者服務手冊背景

summary.en: NEPRA lists Grid Code 2023 and Distribution Code 2005 among official codes, while public EV charging connection and metering controls are mainly framed through the EV charging framework, Consumer Service Manual, Distribution Code, and utility conditions. Grid Code 2023 should not be described as an every-EVSE product rule.
summary.zh: NEPRA在官方规范中列出《2023电网规范》和《2005配电规范》，而公共充电接入和计量控制主要通过充电框架、消费者服务手册、配电规范和公用事业条件体现。不应将《2023电网规范》描述为适用于每台EVSE的产品规则。
summary.zht: NEPRA在官方規範中列出《2023電網規範》和《2005配電規範》，而公共充電接入和計量控制主要通過充電框架、消費者服務手冊、配電規範和公用事業條件體現。不應將《2023電網規範》描述為適用於每台EVSE的產品規則。

standards_or_laws: NEPRA Regulatory Framework for Electric Vehicle Charging Stations

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 and exact GB/T 20234.1-2023 / 20234.2-2015 / 20234.3-2023 / 20234.4-2023 evidence do not replace Pakistan network studies, transformer capacity checks, protection coordination, harmonics assumptions, earthing review, service upgrades, or utility energisation steps.
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023以及准确GB/T 20234.1-2023/20234.2-2015/20234.3-2023/20234.4-2023证据不能替代巴基斯坦网络研究、变压器容量核查、保护配合、谐波假设、接地审查、服务升级或公用事业送电步骤。
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023以及準確GB/T 20234.1-2023／20234.2-2015／20234.3-2023／20234.4-2023證據不能替代巴基斯坦網絡研究、變壓器容量核查、保護配合、諧波假設、接地審查、服務升級或公用事業送電步驟。

gap.en: Frame grid compliance as a site and network-connection review. High-power or hub sites should prepare load, transformer, protection, harmonics, earthing, and service-upgrade data for the relevant DISCO or K-Electric process.
gap.zh: 应将电网合规表述为现场和网络接入审查。大功率或集群场站应为相关DISCO或K-Electric流程准备负荷、变压器、保护、谐波、接地和服务升级数据。
gap.zht: 應將電網合規表述為現場和網絡接入審查。大功率或集群場站應為相關DISCO或K-Electric流程準備負荷、變壓器、保護、諧波、接地和服務升級數據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a grid, distribution, Consumer Service Manual, utility, or project connection approval applies; not a blanket every-EVSE product standard
mandatory_status.cn: China product standards do not replace Pakistan utility connection approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Grid Code 2023 as network context where relevant, with CSM and Distribution Code controls doing most EV charging connection work.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将《2023电网规范》视为相关时的网络背景，EV充电接入主要由消费者服务手册和配电规范控制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將《2023電網規範》視為相關時的網絡背景，EV充電接入主要由消費者服務手冊和配電規範控制。
